D1:1.speaker: Gina
D1:1.text: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?

D1:2.speaker: Jon
D1:2.text: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.

D1:3.speaker: Gina
D1:3.text: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?

D1:4.speaker: Jon
D1:4.text: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.

D1:5.speaker: Gina
D1:5.text: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?

D1:6.speaker: Jon
D1:6.text: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.

D1:7.speaker: Gina
D1:7.text: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?

D1:8.speaker: Jon
D1:8.text: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?

D1:9.speaker: Gina
D1:9.text: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.

D1:10.speaker: Jon
D1:10.text: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!

D1:11.speaker: Gina
D1:11.text: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!

D1:12.speaker: Jon
D1:12.text: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!

D1:13.speaker: Gina
D1:13.text: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!

D1:14.speaker: Jon
D1:14.text: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
D1:14.blip_caption: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance
D1:14.query: dancing on stage performance dance competition last year

D1:16.speaker: Jon
D1:16.text: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?

D1:17.speaker: Gina
D1:17.text: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
D1:17.blip_caption: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other

D1:18.speaker: Jon
D1:18.text: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?

D1:19.speaker: Gina
D1:19.text: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
D1:19.blip_caption: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water

D1:20.speaker: Jon
D1:20.text: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
D1:20.blip_caption: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats

D1:21.speaker: Gina
D1:21.text: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?

D1:22.speaker: Jon
D1:22.text: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!

D1:23.speaker: Gina
D1:23.text: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?

D1:24.speaker: Jon
D1:24.text: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
D1:24.blip_caption: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage

D1:25.speaker: Gina
D1:25.text: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!

D1:26.speaker: Jon
D1:26.text: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.

D1:27.speaker: Gina
D1:27.text: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!

D1:28.speaker: Jon
D1:28.text: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

D10:1.speaker: Jon
D10:1.text: Hi Gina! I just wanted to fill you in on my business. Yesterday, I went to a fair to show off my studio, it was both stressful and great! I got some possible leads, so that was awesome. But overall, I've learned that this biz is no cakewalk and having confidence in yourself is important for making it successful!
D10:1.blip_caption: a photo of a group of women performing a dance on a stage
D10:1.query: fair booth flyers brochures dance studio

D10:2.speaker: Gina
D10:2.text: Hey Jon, congrats on the fair! It's awesome to see your hard work paying off. Keep on pushing, pal, you're headed for greatness. Oh, and BTW, I started my own online clothing store not so long ago - pretty cool, huh?
D10:2.blip_caption: a photography of a laptop with a sale ad on the screen

D10:3.speaker: Jon
D10:3.text: Thanks, Gina! Appreciate your support. Your store looks great, I remember it!

D10:4.speaker: Gina
D10:4.text: Thanks, Jon! After losing my job, I wanted to take control of my own destiny and this seemed like the perfect way to do it. It's been a tough journey, but very rewarding.

D10:5.speaker: Jon
D10:5.text: Wow, you're awesome for going for it! Setbacks can help us reach our potential, right? I'm having trouble with my business project. Any advice on staying motivated even when times are tough?

D10:6.speaker: Gina
D10:6.text: Yeah Jon! Challenges are awesome for learning and growth. To stay motivated, I think of the big goal and why I'm doing it. I also get help from people who support me. And of course, I dance it out. Do you need advice on anything in particular?

D10:7.speaker: Jon
D10:7.text: I've been feeling kinda low on confidence lately. It's hard to run a business when you don't have faith in yourself. Any tips on how you stay confident in your business?

D10:8.speaker: Gina
D10:8.text: I get it, Jon. Confidence is important in business. I stay motivated by reminding myself of my successes and progress. It also helps to have a good support system. Just focus on why you started this – because you love it! Have faith in yourself, Jon. I do!

D10:9.speaker: Jon
D10:9.text: Thanks! Your words mean a lot. Gotta focus on success and why I started. You're right, I love it and that'll keep my confidence up.

D10:10.speaker: Gina
D10:10.text: No worries, Jon! Sounds like what I said was helpful. You're incredibly talented and passionate about dance. Don't forget, believe in yourself and your abilities. Tackle any obstacle that comes your way and keep shining!

D10:11.speaker: Jon
D10:11.text: Thanks! Your support means a lot. I'm gonna keep going and reach my dreams no matter what.

D10:12.speaker: Gina
D10:12.text: Go for it, Jon! You got this! Don't let anything stop you. We're in this together!

D10:13.speaker: Jon
D10:13.text: Appreciate your encouragement. We'll keep pushing each other on this path.

D10:14.speaker: Gina
D10:14.text: Yeah! Let's keep each other going. We can do it!

D11:1.speaker: Jon
D11:1.text: Hi! Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!
D11:1.blip_caption: a photo of a woman in a short skirt with her hands on her hips

D11:2.speaker: Gina
D11:2.text: Hi! You're so inspiring taking it on and opening your own studio!

D11:3.speaker: Jon
D11:3.text: Thanks! Losing my job gave me the push to finally start my dream business: my own dance studio! Now I'm stepping into the unknown and hoping for the best.

D11:4.speaker: Gina
D11:4.text: It must be scary stepping into the unknown but I know you can do it, Jon. With your determination and drive, your dance studio will be a huge success. Keep that positive outlook and keep going!

D11:5.speaker: Jon
D11:5.text: Thanks! It's a bit scary, but I just think about my love for dance and how it makes me feel. It's been my stress-buster since childhood!

D11:6.speaker: Gina
D11:6.text: Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy.

D11:7.speaker: Jon
D11:7.text: Yeah, Gina! Dancing helps me de-stress. It's where I'm most alive. It's a must-have in my life.

D11:8.speaker: Gina
D11:8.text: I get it, Jon. Dance is just me -- I can't picture life without it. It's like air.

D11:9.speaker: Jon
D11:9.text: Yep! Dancing is like second nature to me. I'm living my dream by having my own dance studio and teaching others.

D11:10.speaker: Gina
D11:10.text: You're living the dream and inspiring others too! Your studio will totally change things for lots of folks.

D11:11.speaker: Jon
D11:11.text: I hope so, Gina. I want to create a place for people to dance and express themselves - it's been a dream of mine.

D11:12.speaker: Gina
D11:12.text: That's a great dream, Jon! Giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important. Your studio is gonna make a huge difference. Can't wait to see it happen!

D11:13.speaker: Jon
D11:13.text: Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on the dance studio progress.

D11:14.speaker: Gina
D11:14.text: Thanks! Really appreciate you keeping me in the loop on this cool project. Can't wait to hear more and watch it come to life! Oh, btw, I had an interview for a design internship yesterday! It was so cool.

D11:15.speaker: Jon
D11:15.text: Wow, Gina, I'm stoked about this! Taking a risk is scary, but I'm sure following my dreams will pay off in the end. How did the interview go?

D11:17.speaker: Jon
D11:17.text: Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately, it keeps my mind focused and motivated.

D11:18.speaker: Gina
D11:18.text: Wow! That's great. Dancing is awesome for staying focused. Wanna show me a routine sometime?

D11:19.speaker: Jon
D11:19.text: Sure, Gina! Wanna see one of my routines? Lemme know when you got time and I'll send you a vid.

D11:20.speaker: Gina
D11:20.text: Yeah, Jon, I'll watch your routine! So proud of you!

D11:21.speaker: Jon
D11:21.text: Thanks a lot! Your help really means a lot. I'll get the video to you soon!

D11:22.speaker: Gina
D11:22.text: No prob! Always here to help. Can't wait to see the vid!

D12:1.speaker: Gina
D12:1.text: Hey Jon! Long time no talk! A lot's happened - I just got accepted for a fashion internship!

D12:2.speaker: Jon
D12:2.text: Congrats, Gina! That's awesome news about the fashion internship. 🎉 So stoked for you. Where is the internship and how're you feelin' about it?

D12:3.speaker: Gina
D12:3.text: Thanks! I'm excited and kinda nervous. Gonna be a big change. It's part-time position in the fashion department of an international company.
D12:3.blip_caption: a photo of a laptop computer with a logo on the screen

D12:4.speaker: Jon
D12:4.text: Way to go, Gina! You really stepped up. What's your plan for the future?
D12:4.blip_caption: a photo of a book with a yellow and green cover

D12:5.speaker: Gina
D12:5.text: Thanks! I'm a mix of excited and scared to get into fashion, but I'm trying to stay upbeat and learn as much as I can. What about you? Got something new?

D12:6.speaker: Jon
D12:6.text: I'm currently reading "The Lean Startup" and hoping it'll give me tips for my biz.

D12:7.speaker: Gina
D12:7.text: It sounds great! Could it spark any ideas for your dance studio?

D12:8.speaker: Jon
D12:8.text: Yeah, the book got me thinking about building a focused and efficient business. Adapting and tweaking from customer feedback is important too, so I'm gonna try it out!
D12:8.blip_caption: a photo of a white board with a list of dates on it

D12:9.speaker: Gina
D12:9.text: Woah, Jon, that whiteboard's got a bunch of good ideas! How you gonna keep track and stay on schedule with those dates?

D12:10.speaker: Jon
D12:10.text: Thanks, Gina! It helps me keep track of ideas and milestones. Gives me a visual of my progress and keeps me organized.

D12:11.speaker: Gina
D12:11.text: Nice idea! Having something visual can help with organizing and motivation. What're you working on currently?

D12:12.speaker: Jon
D12:12.text: I'm wrapping up the business plan and looking for investors. My passion for the project and belief in its success are driving me.

D12:13.speaker: Gina
D12:13.text: Wow, Jon! Impressed by your commitment. How's the hunt for investors going?

D12:14.speaker: Jon
D12:14.text: Thanks! Searching for investors has been tough, but I'm staying hopeful. It's all a process and I'm learning a ton.

D12:15.speaker: Gina
D12:15.text: Yeah Jon, you've got the right attitude! Keep learning and growing through it all. Keep going!

D12:16.speaker: Jon
D12:16.text: Thanks! I really appreciate your help. I'm gonna keep on going and never quit.
D12:16.blip_caption: a photo of a pink sign with a message on it

D12:18.speaker: Jon
D12:18.text: Thanks! Your words really mean a lot. Don't worry, I won't let anything get me down.

D12:19.speaker: Gina
D12:19.text: Go Jon! Obstacles are inevitable, but you can do awesome things. Keep going!

D13:1.speaker: Jon
D13:1.text: Hey Gina, thanks for being there for me and believing in me. It means a lot.

D13:2.speaker: Gina
D13:2.text: Sure, Jon! I'm always around for you. How've you been since we caught up?

D13:3.speaker: Jon
D13:3.text: I'm prepping for my dance studio more than ever!

D13:4.speaker: Gina
D13:4.text: Proud of you for starting your own business! It takes strength to stay hopeful. What are you doing to prep for your dance studio? I have developed a video presentation to teach how to style my fashion pieces, btw.
D13:4.blip_caption: a photo of a group of young girls in blue outfits posing for a picture

D13:5.speaker: Jon
D13:5.text: Thanks, Gina! It's been so inspiring to work with our young dancers, seeing their passion and commitment. Opening the dance studio's been a great experience - I want it to be a place of support and encouragement for all our dancers. Will you show me this presentation?

D13:6.speaker: Gina
D13:6.text: Shure, I will send it to you later. Starting this studio isn't just a business, it's a place for dancers to grow. What support are you offering them?
D13:6.blip_caption: a photo of a skeleton and a trophy on a black cloth

D13:7.speaker: Jon
D13:7.text: Besides the dance classes and workshops, I'm offering one-on-one mentoring and training to help dancers reach their full potential.

D13:8.speaker: Gina
D13:8.text: Your one-on-one mentoring and training will really push dancers to reach their goals. I totally get it, I had a mentor too when I was learning how to dance.
D13:8.blip_caption: a photo of a group of people in a dance class

D13:9.speaker: Jon
D13:9.text: Yeah, a mentor can do wonders. Guidance and support can help dancers really shine.
D13:9.blip_caption: a photo of a clipboard with a notepad attached to it

D13:10.speaker: Gina
D13:10.text: Nice one, Jon! How've you been using it?

D13:11.speaker: Jon
D13:11.text: I'm using it to stay organized and motivated. It sets goals, tracks my achievements and helps me find areas to improve.
D13:11.blip_caption: a photo of a notebook with a calendar on it

D13:12.speaker: Gina
D13:12.text: Really cool system! Being organized sure is key for getting stuff done. How do you keep up with your goals and progress?

D13:13.speaker: Jon
D13:13.text: I also use whiteboard to stay on track, visualize goals and tokenize successes. It keeps me motivated and focused.
D13:13.blip_caption: a photo of a group of markers sitting on top of a white surface

D13:14.speaker: Gina
D13:14.text: Cool! Are you using different colors?

D13:15.speaker: Jon
D13:15.text: Yes. I color-code achievements so I can easily track my progress and stay motivated.

D13:16.speaker: Gina
D13:16.text: Wow, color-coding is a great way to track your progress & stay motivated. Keep it up!
D13:16.blip_caption: a photo of a cork board with pictures and words on it

D13:17.speaker: Jon
D13:17.text: Thanks! It helps me stay motivated and reminds me why I'm doing this.

D13:18.speaker: Gina
D13:18.blip_caption: a photo of a person holding a paper bag with a picture of a bird and a birdie

D13:20.speaker: Gina
D13:20.text: Remember that staying positive is very important.  Rock on!
D13:20.blip_caption: a photo of a quote on a white sheet with a rainbow of light

D13:21.speaker: Jon
D13:21.text: Thanks, Gina! Your support's really been awesome.

D13:22.speaker: Gina
D13:22.text: Thanks! Keep going for your dreams and don't quit!

D13:23.speaker: Jon
D13:23.text: I won't give up, Gina! I'll keep pushing and working to make my dreams happen. Thanks for the support!

D14:1.speaker: Jon
D14:1.text: Gina, you won't believe it - I got mentored by this amazing business dude yesterday! It was really inspiring and now I'm even more pumped to chase my dreams. What's been up with you lately?

D14:2.speaker: Gina
D14:2.text: Wow, Jon! Mentors can really help. I'm working on my online store, growing the customer base. It's tough but I'm determined. How about you? Any new things happening?

D14:3.speaker: Jon
D14:3.text: Been doing some promotion for my business. Crazy ride so far, but I'm hanging in there. Got any tips for marketing?

D14:4.speaker: Gina
D14:4.text: Awesome! Marketing is key. Use social media channels and work with influencers for bigger reach.

D14:5.speaker: Jon
D14:5.text: Thanks for the advice, Gina! I already started doing what you said about social media and posted some of my dance videos. It's creating a bit of a stir.

D14:6.speaker: Gina
D14:6.text: Nice! Glad your dance vids are doing well online. Keep it up!

D14:7.speaker: Jon
D14:7.text: Your help really helps. Hey, have you thought about being an entrepreneur?

D14:8.speaker: Gina
D14:8.text: Ha, yeah, Jon. I've been one 'cause I lost my job. I opened an online clothing store and it's been great! Being my own boss and doing something I love is awesome.

D14:9.speaker: Jon
D14:9.text: Wow, Gina! You did great taking that leap. Congrats! Got any advice for someone just starting out?

D14:10.speaker: Gina
D14:10.text: Thanks, Jon! It was a huge jump, but totally worth it. My advice: stay passionate, focused and resilient. Challenges will come, but believe in yourself and keep going. And stay open to learning and improving.

D14:11.speaker: Jon
D14:11.text: Appreciate your advice. Gotta stay resilient and focused, that's key!

D14:12.speaker: Gina
D14:12.text: Yep Jon, staying resilient and focused is key for any entrepreneur. Keep going and don't give up! You got this!

D14:13.speaker: Jon
D14:13.text: Thanks! I won't quit, no matter what. Your encouragement really motivates me to keep going.

D14:14.speaker: Gina
D14:14.text: Way to go, Jon! Don't quit, remember, failures lead you closer to success. Here's a pic from when I was dancing - it was a tough road, but it was worth it!
D14:14.blip_caption: a photo of a group of young women posing for a picture

D14:15.speaker: Jon
D14:15.text: Wow, that's an awesome pic! You guys look great and passionate about dancing. Reminds me how much I love performing. Thanks for sharing!

D14:16.speaker: Gina
D14:16.text: Thanks! I'm glad the pic reminded you of your love for dancing. Keep going after your dreams!

D14:17.speaker: Jon
D14:17.text: Sure thing, Gina! Your help means a lot to me. I'm not giving up.

D14:18.speaker: Gina
D14:18.text: Go, Jon! I'm here for you. Keep going!

D14:19.speaker: Jon
D14:19.text: Knowing you've got my back really helps keep me going. I won't let you down!

D14:20.speaker: Gina
D14:20.text: No worries, Jon! You're really inspiring with your determination and passion for dance. Keep it up!

D15:1.speaker: Jon
D15:1.text: Hey Gina, hope you're doing great! Still working on my biz. Took a short trip last week to Rome to clear my mind a little.

D15:2.speaker: Gina
D15:2.text: Hi! Good for you! It definitely will help you to concentrate on your biz better.

D15:3.speaker: Jon
D15:3.text: Thanks, Gina. Still working on opening a dance studio.

D15:4.speaker: Gina
D15:4.text: When are you opening the studio?

D15:5.speaker: Jon
D15:5.text: The official opening night is tomorrow. I'm working hard to make everything just right. Can't wait to see it all come together!
D15:5.blip_caption: a photo of a group of young dancers in a dance studio
D15:5.query: dance studio front entrance dancers rehearsing

D15:6.speaker: Gina
D15:6.text: Congrats, Jon! The studio looks amazing. You've put a lot of work into this and I'm so pumped for the launch tomorrow. Don't miss a beat!

D15:7.speaker: Jon
D15:7.text: Thanks, Gina! I'm excited! It's been a wild ride, but I'm feeling good and ready to give it my best.

D15:8.speaker: Gina
D15:8.text: Wow, Jon, you must be so excited! You've come so far since we last talked, and tomorrow's gonna be a blast! All those long nights were worth it - so take some time to savor it. Capture the joy and thrill that dance brings - it's magical!

D15:9.speaker: Jon
D15:9.text: Tomorrow's gonna be an awesome night and I'm not gonna forget a second of it. I put so much into this and I want to savor all the good vibes. Thanks for always having my back. You're the best!

D15:10.speaker: Gina
D15:10.text: I'm always proud of you. Enjoy the good feels tomorrow, you earned it!

D15:11.speaker: Jon
D15:11.text: Thanks! Your pride and support mean a lot. Looking forward to enjoying the moment with you.

D15:12.speaker: Gina
D15:12.text: I'll be right by your side, Jon. Let's live it up and make some great memories tomorrow. So excited!
D15:12.blip_caption: a photo of a group of people in a dance studio

D15:13.speaker: Jon
D15:13.text: Yeah! Let's make some awesome memories tomorrow at the grand opening!
D15:13.blip_caption: a photo of a man in a native costume is giving another man a high five

D15:14.speaker: Gina
D15:14.text: Can't wait to make more memories at your dance studio!

D15:15.speaker: Jon
D15:15.text: Looking forward to more cool memories!

D15:16.speaker: Gina
D15:16.text: I love being around friends and having such a great time. Can't wait to have fun at your dance studio!

D15:18.speaker: Gina
D15:18.text: Can't wait for tomorrow's grand opening!

D15:19.speaker: Jon
D15:19.text: Woohoo! Tomorrow's opening will be so much fun. Can't wait for it - and for you to be there!

D15:21.speaker: Jon
D15:21.text: Definitely! Let's make tomorrow unforgettable, Gina. See you there! Bye!

D16:1.speaker: Gina
D16:1.text: Hey Jon, what's been up? Some pretty cool stuff happened since we talked. I have acquired some new unique pieces for my store.
D16:1.blip_caption: a photo of a woman in a black hoodie posing for a picture
D16:1.query: online clothing store logo fashion unique pieces

D16:2.speaker: Jon
D16:2.text: Congrats on your store, Gina! Happy for you! It looks sick - is it a unique piece you're selling?

D16:3.speaker: Gina
D16:3.text: Thanks! This hoodie isn't for sale, it's from my own collection. I made a limited edition line last week to show off my style and creativity - it was tough but worth it!
D16:3.blip_caption: a photo of a hoodie with a camouflage print on it

D16:5.speaker: Gina
D16:5.text: This design reminds me of the grit it takes to stand out and face challenges.

D16:6.speaker: Jon
D16:6.text: That's awesome, Gina! Yesterday I chose to go to networking events to make things happen. It's been tough but I'm staying determined and focused.

D16:7.speaker: Gina
D16:7.text: Way to go, Jon! Attending those networking events takes guts and drive. Keep it up!

D16:8.speaker: Jon
D16:8.text: Thanks! It's been tough going since I lost my job, but I'm sure investing my time in my business will pay off eventually. I really appreciate your help.

D16:9.speaker: Gina
D16:9.text: No worries, Jon! You got this! Let me know if you need anything.
D16:9.blip_caption: a photo of a notepad with a pen and a pen on it

D16:10.speaker: Jon
D16:10.text: Your help matters to me. I am writing all my plans down.

D16:11.speaker: Gina
D16:11.text: Nice work! Tracking your plans and goals is key. It's like a picture of all your progress.

D16:12.speaker: Jon
D16:12.text: Thanks, Gina! Seeing my goals written down on paper really helps keep me motivated and focused on what I have to do. I know it won't be easy, but I'm sure it'll pay off. Thanks for the support!

D16:13.speaker: Gina
D16:13.text: No worries, Jon! When things get rough, keep persevering and keep working hard. You'll get there! Don't quit!
D16:13.blip_caption: a photo of a sign that says never give up never give up never

D16:14.speaker: Jon
D16:14.text: Thanks, Gina! That sign reminds me to never give up, however hard things get. I'll keep going!

D16:15.speaker: Gina
D16:15.text: Believe in yourself and keep going. You can do it!

D16:16.speaker: Jon
D16:16.text: Thanks! I'm feeling confident and won't give up. Your support means a ton to me.
D16:16.blip_caption: a photo of a bulletin board with pictures of people and words

D17:1.speaker: Gina
D17:1.text: Hey Jon! Long time no chat! How's the dance studio? Last week was wild, I got noticed by fashion editors and it's been amazing but kinda scary. Everything's exciting but it's a lot of pressure to keep going up!
D17:1.blip_caption: a photo of a mannequin in a room with a wood wall

D17:2.speaker: Jon
D17:2.text: Hey Gina! Congrats on the fashion editors reach-out, that's awesome! Dance practice has been fun and exhausting. I'm gonna stay determined and make my own path by going full-time with my biz idea.

D17:3.speaker: Gina
D17:3.text: Just remember that sometimes stumbling blocks can be opened doors. Keep going!

D17:4.speaker: Jon
D17:4.text: Thanks! Your support and encouragement means a lot. Losing my job was a bummer, but it pushed me to take the plunge and go for my biz dreams. Started to learn all these marketing and analytics tools to push the biz forward today. It's been tricky, but I'm up for the challenge and I'm gonna make this work!

D17:6.speaker: Jon
D17:6.text: I'm also excited to guide and mentor aspiring dancers on their dreams.

D17:7.speaker: Gina
D17:7.text: Wow, Jon! That's awesome. Loving what you do and bringing joy to others is so rewarding. You're definitely the perfect mentor & guide. Your positivity and determination will make your dance studio a hit!
D17:7.blip_caption: a photo of a drawing of a couple dancing

D17:8.speaker: Jon
D17:8.text: Thanks, Gina - really appreciate your words and encouragement! Dance has the power to bring us together and create sweet moments. Moments like this remind me why I'm chasing my dream and keep me pushing through any struggles.

D17:9.speaker: Gina
D17:9.text: Take comfort in knowing you've got a solid community cheering you on, me included. Keep on pushing!

D17:10.speaker: Jon
D17:10.text: Feeling supported by all of you means so much. It gives me the oomph to keep chasing my dreams. Your faith in me is priceless - I won't let you down!

D17:11.speaker: Gina
D17:11.text: Don't let anything stop you. You have potential!

D17:12.speaker: Jon
D17:12.text: Thanks, Gina! Your faith in me is a real boost. I'm gonna make my dreams come true!

D17:13.speaker: Gina
D17:13.text: Keep pushing and you'll get there. Your dreams are so close!

D17:14.speaker: Jon
D17:14.text: Thanks, Gina! I won't quit, even when it's hard. I'm gonna make it!

D17:15.speaker: Gina
D17:15.text: You got this, Jon! Don't let the bumps in the road bring you down. Keep going and make your dreams a reality! I'm rooting for you!

D17:16.speaker: Jon
D17:16.text: Thanks, Gina! Your belief in me means the world. I'm not gonna let anything or anyone stop me. I'll keep pushing and make my dreams come true. Thanks for being a great friend. You rock!
D17:16.blip_caption: a photo of a chalkboard with a quote written on it

D17:17.speaker: Gina
D17:17.text: Hey Jon, glad I could help! Always here to cheer you on.

D17:18.speaker: Jon
D17:18.text: Thanks! Glad that you are on my side.
D17:18.blip_caption: a photo of a drawing of a smiley face floating in the water

D18:1.speaker: Gina
D18:1.text: Hey Jon! Long time no talk! Last week, I built a new website for customers to make orders. It's been a wild ride but I'm loving it. What's up with you? How's the dance studio?

D18:2.speaker: Jon
D18:2.text: Hey Gina, congrats on the clothing store! The dance studio is on tenuous grounds right now, but I'm staying positive. I got a temp job to help cover expenses while I look for investors. It's tough, but I'm sure it'll be worth it.

D18:3.speaker: Gina
D18:3.text: Thanks, Jon! Appreciate the kind words. Sorry to hear about the studio, but glad to see the positivity. Not easy facing setbacks but I believe in you. Finding investors can be tough, but you've got the passion and experience to make it happen. Rome wasn't built in a day so keep pushing on!

D18:4.speaker: Jon
D18:4.text: Thanks for the support. Running a business isn't easy, but I'm determined to make it work. How have you tackled challenges in your business? Got any advice?

D18:5.speaker: Gina
D18:5.text: I've had some tough times with my business, Jon. Sourcing trendy pieces for my store was a big hurdle. I had to do a lot of research and networking. My advice? Don't be scared to reach out to people in your field for help and contacts. Networking was a lifesaver for me and opened me up to amazing products that I might not have found otherwise.

D18:6.speaker: Jon
D18:6.text: Awesome advice! Lately I've been networking and it's gotten me some good stuff. Really can't beat what connections can do. Check this pic I got from the last networking event!
D18:6.blip_caption: a photography of a group of people standing in a room

D18:7.speaker: Gina
D18:7.text: Nice one, Jon! Networking really pays off. Connecting with like-minded people is key. How was the event?
D18:7.blip_caption: a photo of a clothing store with a wall of pictures and clothes

D18:8.speaker: Jon
D18:8.text: Thanks! The event was awesome. I met some investors and got some good advice. The energy was really motivating, it gave me a boost to go after my goals.
D18:8.blip_caption: a photo of a man signing a card at a table
D18:8.query: crowded networking event people mingling business cards

D18:9.speaker: Gina
D18:9.text: Wow, Jon! Congrats on the successful night! What are your plans now with the advice you got?

D18:10.speaker: Jon
D18:10.text: Taking your advice, I'm sprucing up my biz plan and tweaking my pitch to investors. I'm also working on an online platform to show off the dance studio's stuff.

D18:11.speaker: Gina
D18:11.text: Sounds like a great plan, Jon! An online platform can really show off your studio and get investors. Need help with anything?

D18:12.speaker: Jon
D18:12.text: Thanks, Gina! Appreciate the offer. Need help with marketing strategies - any advice on reaching my target audience and raising awareness for the dance studio?

D18:13.speaker: Gina
D18:13.text: Yeah Jon, marketing is key for getting your dance studio noticed. Instagram and TikTok can help you reach a younger crowd. Posting dance clips or content related to dance can help. You could also collaborate with local influencers or dance communities. I could help you with making content or even managing your accounts if you want.

D18:14.speaker: Jon
D18:14.text: Sounds great. I'd really appreciate your help with making content and managing my social media. Let's get together and make the dance studio look awesome!
D18:14.blip_caption: a photo of a room with a mirror and a desk

D18:15.speaker: Gina
D18:15.text: Let's create some cool content and manage your social media accounts.

D18:16.speaker: Jon
D18:16.text: Thanks for the support. You rock!

D18:17.speaker: Gina
D18:17.text: Thanks, Jon! You're awesome. Let's get to work and make your studio shine!

D18:18.speaker: Jon
D18:18.text: Definitely, Gina! Let's make our collaboration awesome and bring some dance magic to the world. Can't wait to see what we can do together!

D18:19.speaker: Gina
D18:19.text: Definitely, Jon! I'm pumped to collaborate with you and make some sweet moves. Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!

D18:20.speaker: Jon
D18:20.text: Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!

D18:21.speaker: Gina
D18:21.text: Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show 'em what we got. We can do amazing things together!

D19:1.speaker: Jon
D19:1.text: Hey Gina! We haven't talked in a few days. Been rehearsing hard and working on business plans. It's been stressful, but dancing has kept me going.

D19:2.speaker: Gina
D19:2.text: Hey Jon! Remember, just do it! You should get to the point where anyone else would quit and you're not going to stop there. No, what are you waiting for? Do it! Just do it!
D19:2.blip_caption: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with their arms in the air

D19:3.speaker: Jon
D19:3.text: Ha, ha! Thanks, Gina. Sounds familiar, who do those words belong to?

D19:5.speaker: Jon
D19:5.text: Ahhahha, really!? Yea, that definitely him.

D19:6.speaker: Gina
D19:6.text: Hah, yeah!) But really having a creative space for dancers is so important. Last Friday at dance class with a group of friends I felt it. Your studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression. Keep up the good work and don't forget your passion for dance.
D19:6.blip_caption: a photo of three girls in ballet costumes sitting on a desk

D19:7.speaker: Jon
D19:7.text: Thanks, Gina! Your words of encouragement keep me motivated. Can't wait 'til my studio starts welcoming dancers of all ages and backgrounds!

D19:8.speaker: Gina
D19:8.text: I'm so happy to see my words motivating you, Jon. <3

D19:9.speaker: Jon
D19:9.text: Thanks a ton, Gina! Your help and encouragement mean a lot. Your support will help me make it happen.

D19:10.speaker: Gina
D19:10.text: You're welcome, Jon! I'm here to support you. Every step's getting you closer to your dream. Never give up! You're doing great.

D19:11.speaker: Jon
D19:11.text: Thanks, Gina! I won't quit. I'm gonna keep going, whatever comes my way.

D19:13.speaker: Jon
D19:13.text: Ah ha ha, yeah, JUST DOING IT!

D2:1.speaker: Gina
D2:1.text: Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things have been hectic lately. I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!
D2:1.blip_caption: a photo of a clothing store with a variety of clothes on display

D2:2.speaker: Jon
D2:2.text: Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.

D2:3.speaker: Gina
D2:3.text: Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?

D2:4.speaker: Jon
D2:4.text: Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool.
D2:4.blip_caption: a photo of a bathroom with a blue floor and a pink wall
D2:4.query: dance studio natural lighting spacious room large windows dance mirrors

D2:5.speaker: Gina
D2:5.text: Wow, nice spot! Where is it? Got any other features you want to think about before you decide? Paris?! That is really great Jon! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once.

D2:6.speaker: Jon
D2:6.text: It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely.

D2:7.speaker: Gina
D2:7.text: Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. You thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like?

D2:8.speaker: Jon
D2:8.text: Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.

D2:9.speaker: Gina
D2:9.text: Sounds great! Marley's perfect; it's got the right amount of grip and movement. Can't wait to see your dance studio done!

D2:10.speaker: Jon
D2:10.text: Yeah, can't wait to see it done! Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!

D2:11.speaker: Gina
D2:11.text: Believe in yourself, Jon! The process may be tough, but you got this. Push through and it'll be worth it. Don't forget to take breaks and dance it out when you need to destress!

D2:12.speaker: Jon
D2:12.text: Glad I have you in my corner! Gotta make time to dance and vent, that's for sure. We'll make it through this - hang in there!

D2:14.speaker: Jon
D2:14.text: Let's keep going and chase our dreams!

D2:15.speaker: Gina
D2:15.text: Yeah! We've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming. Let's keep going after our goals and making them happen.

D2:16.speaker: Jon
D2:16.text: Success is almost here. We got this!

D3:1.speaker: Jon
D3:1.text: Hey Gina, hope you're doing ok! Still following my passion for dance. It's been bumpy, but I'm determined to make it work. I'm still searching for a place to open my dance studio.

D3:2.speaker: Gina
D3:2.text: Hi Jon! So happy you're pushing forward with dancing! Inspiring 💪 I emailed some wholesalers and one replied and said yes today! I'm over the moon because now I can expand my clothing store and get closer to my customers. Check it out - here's a pic!
D3:2.blip_caption: a photography of a shopping mall with a glass entrance and a sign

D3:3.speaker: Jon
D3:3.text: Wow, Gina! You found the perfect spot for your store. Way to go, hard work's paying off!
D3:3.blip_caption: a photo of a room with a mirror and a wooden floor

D3:4.speaker: Gina
D3:4.text: Thanks! Glad you like it. Yeah, it's a great spot. Here's a peek at the space I designed. Cozy and inviting - perfect for customers to check out all the trendy pieces.
D3:4.blip_caption: a photography of a clothing store with a lot of clothes on display
D3:4.query: inside of store cozy inviting atmosphere trendy pieces

D3:5.speaker: Jon
D3:5.text: Wow, it looks great! Must've taken you ages to design it. What made you pick out the furniture and decor?

D3:6.speaker: Gina
D3:6.text: Thanks! It took a bit of time but I wanted to make the place look like my own style and make my customers feel cozy. I chose furniture that looks great and is comfy too. The chandelier adds a nice glam feel while matching the style of the store.

D3:7.speaker: Jon
D3:7.text: Your store looks great - your customers will be so comfy.

D3:8.speaker: Gina
D3:8.text: Thanks! Making my spot comfortable and inviting for my customers is key. I want 'em to feel like they're in a cool oasis. Just creating an experience that'll make 'em wanna come back.

D3:9.speaker: Jon
D3:9.text: That's a great goal! Creating a special experience for customers is the key to making them feel welcome and coming back. I think you can create that space you're imagining.

D3:10.speaker: Gina
D3:10.text: Thanks. Your support means a lot. I'm sure with my hard work and effort, I can make a special shopping experience for my customers. It's tough but I'm up for the challenge!

D3:11.speaker: Jon
D3:11.text: I'm always here to support you! Go create something awesome with your store. Keep it up!

D3:12.speaker: Gina
D3:12.text: Thanks, Jon! I'll try my best. You're gonna do great with your dance studio, just keep going and stay positive! We'll get through this!

D3:13.speaker: Jon
D3:13.text: Thanks! Your words mean a lot. I'm staying positive and pushing forward. We've put our hearts into our dreams and I'm sure we'll make it.

D3:14.speaker: Gina
D3:14.text: Sure thing, Jon! Stay motivated and keep going. Hard work pays off eventually. We can do this!

D4:1.speaker: Jon
D4:1.text: Hey Gina! What's up? How's the store going? I gotta tell you about this thing with my biz.

D4:2.speaker: Gina
D4:2.text: Hey Jon! The store's doing great! It's a wild ride. How's the biz?

D4:3.speaker: Jon
D4:3.text: Hey Gina! I'm putting in a lot of work on my business even with the obstacles. I'm gonna make it happen!

D4:4.speaker: Gina
D4:4.text: Wow! You've got drive! Keep it up and you'll definitely make a splash.

D4:5.speaker: Jon
D4:5.text: Thanks Gina! Your help really means a lot. Sometimes it's hard when things don't go my way, but I'm sure if I keep pushing, I'll reach my dreams!

D4:6.speaker: Gina
D4:6.text: Understand where you're at, Jon. Setbacks are just opportunities for comebacks. You got the skills, passion, and drive. Plus my full support. Don't give up, buddy!

D4:7.speaker: Jon
D4:7.text: Thanks! Setbacks can be tough, but with your support, I can handle anything. Appreciate you having my back!

D4:8.speaker: Gina
D4:8.text: I'm here for you no matter what! Anything you want to say about your biz?

D4:9.speaker: Jon
D4:9.text: Searching for a dance studio location has been tricky, but I'm determined to find the right spot - when I do, I'm sure the rest will follow!

D4:10.speaker: Gina
D4:10.text: Searching for the perfect dance studio's a tough job, Jon. Hang in there and you'll find it soon!

D4:11.speaker: Jon
D4:11.text: Thanks! Appreciate your encouragement - it means a lot! I'm working on my business and some new dance routines - rehearsing hard for an upcoming show. I'm passionate about dancing and it brings me so much joy and fulfillment.
D4:11.blip_caption: a photo of a woman in a gray dress doing a trick

D4:12.speaker: Gina
D4:12.text: Wow, Jon! You're so talented! What show ya got planned?

D4:13.speaker: Jon
D4:13.text: I'm getting ready for a dance comp near me next month. It's a great chance for me to show my skillz and, hopefully, get some props from the dance fam. Super stoked!

D4:14.speaker: Gina
D4:14.text: Wow Jon, you're gonna kill it in that competition. Your hard work and talent will pay off! Good luck.

D4:15.speaker: Jon
D4:15.text: Thanks! Your help means a lot. I'll do my best to make you proud!

D4:16.speaker: Gina
D4:16.text: No doubt, Jon you've got this. Your passion and commitment are awesome! Keep it up!

D4:17.speaker: Jon
D4:17.text: Thanks! I'm going for my dreams!

D4:18.speaker: Gina
D4:18.text: Absolutely Jon. I'm always here to cheer you on. Make your dreams happen - keep going and believe in yourself. You got this!

D4:19.speaker: Jon
D4:19.text: Thanks, Gina! Your kind words mean a lot. I won't give up!

D5:1.speaker: Gina
D5:1.text: Hey Jon! Great hearing from you again. How have you been? BTW, I found a cool new fashion piece for my store. Can't wait to share with my customers.
D5:1.blip_caption: a photo of a group of women posing with a giant balloon

D5:2.speaker: Jon
D5:2.text: Hey Gina! Congrats on the new fashion piece! Looks like your store is growing. Remenber the festival I told you about? Had that performance and it was awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy and it was nice to be reminded why I'm passionate about it.
D5:2.blip_caption: a photo of a group of young girls in a dance studio

D5:3.speaker: Gina
D5:3.text: Wow! That looks great. You look badass on stage. BTW, what's your favorite part of running your own studio?

D5:4.speaker: Jon
D5:4.text: Thanks, Gina! I love running my own studio. It's great having the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves. I'm super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing my students progress. It's so fulfilling.

D5:5.speaker: Gina
D5:5.text: That's awesome! I'm sure you feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. It's amazing what it can do for people! Oh, and btw - I've been working hard on my online store and just teamed up with a local artist for some cool designs. Check 'em out!
D5:5.blip_caption: a photo of a rack of clothes with a coat and a dress

D5:6.speaker: Jon
D5:6.text: It looks awesome. Your commitment and creativity in your business really stands out. How'd you come up with these cool designs?

D5:7.speaker: Gina
D5:7.text: Thanks Jon! I got the idea from a fashion mag and saw there wasn't much around like it. So I worked with the artist to make it happen - it's all about being ahead of the game and giving my customers something different.

D5:8.speaker: Jon
D5:8.text: Nice one, Gina! You never shy away from a challenge and always try something new. I'm impressed by your willingness to take risks - it's really inspiring.

D5:9.speaker: Gina
D5:9.text: Thanks! Taking risks is scary but it's the only way to grow, right? Just part of the journey to success.

D5:10.speaker: Jon
D5:10.text: Yeah, I totally agree - taking risks is key for success. It's made me grow, and even got me out of my secure 9-5 as a banker. Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.

D5:11.speaker: Gina
D5:11.text: It's tough starting a biz, but don't let it get you down. You can make your studio work, I'm sure. And remember, I'm always here for you.

D5:12.speaker: Jon
D5:12.text: Thanks, Gina. Your help means a lot. I'll keep plugging away and stay optimistic.
D5:12.blip_caption: a photography of a cartoon character with a quote about fear
D5:12.query: motivational quote "everything you want is on the other side of fear"

D5:13.speaker: Gina
D5:13.text: This quote kept me positive through tough times. We all need a push sometimes, right? Even made a tattoo to remind myself about it.
D5:13.blip_caption: a photo of a woman standing on a balcony with a blue dress

D5:14.speaker: Jon
D5:14.text: Love the tattoo, did you just get it?

D5:15.speaker: Gina
D5:15.text: Thanks! Got the tattoo a few years ago, it stands for freedom - dancing without worrying what people think. A reminder to follow my passions and express myself.

D5:16.speaker: Jon
D5:16.text: Nice reminder, Gina! It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.
D5:16.blip_caption: a photo of a woman in a tutu posing for a picture

D5:17.speaker: Gina
D5:17.text: Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!

D5:18.speaker: Jon
D5:18.text: Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams. Dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success!
D5:18.blip_caption: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top

D5:19.speaker: Gina
D5:19.text: This is the right attitude! How have you been juggling dance and business goals?

D5:20.speaker: Jon
D5:20.text: Thanks! Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but so rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.

D5:21.speaker: Gina
D5:21.text: Wow, Jon! You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!

D5:22.speaker: Jon
D5:22.text: Thanks, Gina! Your pep-talk really meant a lot. I'm not gonna give up on my dreams - my dance studio and biz ventures need the hard work I'm putting in. Love having you in my corner, thanks for always being there!

D5:23.speaker: Gina
D5:23.text: Yeah Jon, I'm here for you! Chasing our dreams and helping each other out. Let's keep movin' forward!

D6:1.speaker: Jon
D6:1.text: Hi Gina! Been hectic for me lately. Started hitting the gym last week to stay on track with the venture. Gotta figure out how to balance it all, but it's going well. How about you?

D6:2.speaker: Gina
D6:2.text: Hey Jon! Great to hear from you. Been having some tough times lately.

D6:3.speaker: Jon
D6:3.text: Oof, sorry to hear that. What's up? Is there anything I can do to help?

D6:4.speaker: Gina
D6:4.text: Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your offer. Since I lost my job at Door Dash, things have been tough. But here's some good news - I've got something to share!

D6:5.speaker: Jon
D6:5.text: Wow, that's awesome! Can't wait to hear it!

D6:6.speaker: Gina
D6:6.text: Yay! My online clothes store is open! I've been dreaming of this for a while now - can't wait to see what happens!
D6:6.blip_caption: a photo of a computer screen showing a book and a pair of shoes

D6:7.speaker: Jon
D6:7.text: Congrats! That's awesome! What gave you the idea to start the online store?

D6:8.speaker: Gina
D6:8.text: Thanks! I'm passionate about fashion trends and finding unique pieces. Plus, I wanted to blend my love for dance and fashion, so it was a perfect match.

D6:9.speaker: Jon
D6:9.text: Wow, that's awesome! Combining your two interests into a store is super cool. Best of luck with it!
D6:9.blip_caption: a photo of three young girls standing next to each other with trophies

D6:10.speaker: Gina
D6:10.text: Thanks! How is biz going? I hope it's going well!

D6:11.speaker: Jon
D6:11.text: Thanks for askin', Gina! Losing my job was hard, but I'm livin' my dreams now. Startin' my biz has been tough but I'm gonna make it! I keep facing new challenges, but I'm sure it'll be worth it in the end.
D6:11.blip_caption: a photo of a laptop computer sitting on top of a table

D6:12.speaker: Gina
D6:12.text: Yeah, starting and running my own biz has had its ups and downs - but it's been an amazing ride!

D6:13.speaker: Jon
D6:13.text: Yeah, it's been a rollercoaster. But your success really inspires me to keep pushing forward. Your determination is awesome!

D6:14.speaker: Gina
D6:14.text: Thanks, Jon! Your words are really encouraging. Glad my journey is inspiring others.

D6:15.speaker: Jon
D6:15.text: Yeah, totally! It's great we both face the same challenges, it motivates us and it's like having a partner to dance with!

D6:16.speaker: Gina
D6:16.text: Yep! We're both on different paths, but it's nice to have someone to root for us. We can do it!

D6:17.speaker: Jon
D6:17.text: Definitely! Having someone back us up is great. Let's keep going and reach success together!

D6:18.speaker: Gina
D6:18.text: Let's keep chasing our dreams, supporting each other, and celebrating achievements. We can do great things together!

D6:19.speaker: Jon
D6:19.text: Yeah, Gina, thanks for having my back. Here's to taking on new heights, and all the trials that come with it. Cheers!
D6:19.blip_caption: a photo of two glasses of champagne with a bottle of wine in the background

D7:2.speaker: Gina
D7:2.text: Hey Jon, my online clothing store has been a roller coaster but rewarding. Starting a business takes courage - you hang in there too!
